content.en:
"Finally succeeded in refining the Sky Splitting Divine Pillar!"

Ye Tian smiled.

At this time, the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar stood tall in the small realm, and the Brilliant Divine Power had already converged.

Under Ye Tian's urging, the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar created an area, this area was completely a cultivation area, once entering it, it could withstand the coercion of the Heaven Splitting God Pillar, and people could use this coercion to continuously refine their bodies and souls.

Even Ye Tian, the Lord of the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar, completely used the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar to cultivate.

"Try the cultivation effect!"

Ye Tian walked into the cultivation area, and suddenly a terrifying coercion struck.

The Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar is almost based on the cultivator's cultivation, so there will be no situation where the cultivator will be shocked to death.

Under the pressure of the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar, Ye Tian ran the Nine Extremes True Body Technique, and his cultivation speed was much faster than the usual retreat, and even his divine soul was always being tempered.

"Time accelerates!"

Ye Tian urged the time formation inside the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar, speeding up the time in this area.

In this way, the cultivation speed is so fast.

Of course, it takes a lot of energy to open the Time Array inside the Sky Splitting Pillar, and although the Sky Splitting Pillar can also absorb energy from the outside world, it is only enough to operate itself, and it is difficult to maintain the Time Array, so a large amount of resources must be stored inside the Sky Splitting Pillar.

Otherwise, the cultivator could only open the time formation in the cultivation area to refine the body and soul, but in this way, under the influence of the time array, the effect of refining would definitely not be too good, but it would also be much faster than the usual cultivation speed.

But the most important thing is that you can usually comprehend other things in this cultivation area, and you can also refine your body and soul all the time, which is the most important way to cultivate.

For example, here to comprehend the secret art or the origin of the supernatural powers, the body and soul are growing all the time, what is this concept? It's like lying down and getting stronger!

It can be seen from this that how many strong people can be created in the cultivation area created by the Heaven Splitting God Pillar.

Ye Tian didn't have time to cultivate now, so he closed the cultivation area, but instead urged the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar to engrave the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar inscription on his body.

The Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar is too difficult to urge, and it is unrealistic for a cultivator like Ye Tian to want to fight the enemy with the Heaven Splitting God Pillar in his hand, so it is better to engrave the inscription of the Heaven Splitting God Pillar, so that he can summon the Heaven Splitting God Pillar Phantom Battle.

The Heaven-Splitting Pillar can generally be engraved with three grades of inscriptions, the first grade is an ordinary inscription, which can only increase the strength of three percent; the second grade is the Divine Inscription, which can increase the strength of ten percent, that is, it can double one's own strength; the third grade is the Inscription of the Dao, which can increase the strength by three times.

But under normal circumstances, the Heaven Splitting Sect would not engrave the Dao Inscription on the disciple at all, because this would damage the origin of the Heaven Splitting God Pillar, and it would take a long time to recover.

However, Ye Tian didn't care about the damage of the Heaven Splitting God Pillar, anyway, this thing was his, he naturally had to think about himself, after inscribed the inscription of the Dao, his own strength would be greatly improved, and his safety would be guaranteed.

Therefore, he must inscribe the inscription of the Tao!

Rumble!!!!

The origin of the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar was connected to Ye Tian's back, and a force was constantly transmitted to inscribe lines on Ye Tian's back, and these lines gradually transformed into the appearance of a small Heaven Splitting God Pillar.

After a long time, the inscription was completed, and the inscription of the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar Dao gradually dissipated, and it would not be visible until it was in the middle of the battle, otherwise it would not be seen at all.

"It's time to leave, with the increase in the inscription of the main path of the Heaven Splitting God, my strength has skyrocketed, as long as I am not surrounded by a large number of Dao Ancestor incarnations, with my strength, I should be able to easily get out of trouble!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

Immediately, Ye Tian left this small realm.

But just after Ye Tian left, a voice resounded throughout the small realm.

"This Reserve Peak Master is not simple, his strength is very strong, even stronger than when we were in the True Monarch, and he was lucky enough to snatch the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar of the Heaven Splitting Sect. I remember that there are still some Dao Ancestors in the Heaven Splitting Sect who are still alive, if they know that the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar has been taken away by our Black Wind Mountain's Reserve Peak Master, they will be angry to death!"

Then, another voice rang out—

"The Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar is not a good thing, although it can create six Dao Ancestors, but such a Dao Ancestor is not even as good as a Heavy Heaven Dao Ancestor, it is the weakest kind of Dao Ancestor, and it is useless to the major forces. I remember that the Heaven Splitting Sect once created six Dao Ancestors, and after the fall of these six Dao Ancestors, there were no more Dao Ancestors!"

"It's not of much use to the Heaven Splitting Sect, otherwise those Dao Ancestors of the Heaven Splitting Sect wouldn't have placed the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar in the Heaven Splitting Sect during the Great War. But for this little guy, the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar is still very useful, and it is a real treasure!"

"Wind King, a wisp of your consciousness has awakened, and your body is about to wake up, right?"

"It's coming, but even if I wake up, I don't dare to go out. Now this world is the quasi-Dao realm, and only by becoming the Dao realm can we get out. The Avenue of Chaos does not allow people who break the rules to appear, and if we are forcibly born, I am afraid that we will be seriously attacked. We've been hit hard, and we've finally recovered, and we don't want to be hit again!"

"Yes, only six of our Ten Kings of Black Wind Mountain were lucky enough to follow the Domain Boundary Fragments to this new realm, and the other four kings are estimated to have fallen into the Domain Realm to fight, even if they don't fall, we can't contact them. They are separated by a realm, too far away from each other, and I don't know if there is a chance to return to the Divine Heaven Realm?"

"What are you going back to, you can't find death, it's better to stay in this new realm, this new realm doesn't seem to have a domain ancestor, maybe we can hope to become a domain ancestor here!"

Chatting and talking, the voice faded away.

If Ye Tian heard this conversation, he would probably be extremely shocked, so there was really a Dao Ancestor in Black Wind Mountain who had survived, and he had already been discovered by the Great King of Black Wind Mountain.

However, he was already the reserve peak master of Black Wind Mountain, and the king of Black Wind Mountain naturally would not embarrass him.

In fact, although Black Wind Mountain is a bandit force, it is very united internally, which is also the reason why Black Wind Mountain can always exist in the domain realm, and it is also the reason why many forces are afraid.

------------

Battlefield relics.

Ye Tian flew and shuttled in the sky, looking for a place of opportunity.

As for the Heaven Splitting Sect, he didn't dare to go any further, for fear of being surrounded by other Dao Ancestor incarnations again.

But.

He only flew for half a day before he was stopped by the three Dao Ancestor incarnations.
